refs.description: CPython's bisect module: pure-Python bisect_left/bisect_right reference implementations (with a C-accelerated counterpart in _bisectmodule.c).
Multiple educational binary search variants (iterative, recursive, stdlib bisect) with doctests.
Go standard library sort.Search and SearchInts use binary search over a monotonic predicate.
Redis sorted-set range commands binary-search the skiplist/ziplist representation to locate score boundaries.
